arts.sum: This summer represents a perfect opportunity for Ruben Amorim to rebuild at Man United, and one player unlikely to turn them down is Royal Antwerp’s Senne Lammens. Andre Onana was slammed once again for an awful performance, something that’s becoming a common occurrence, whilst Altay Bayindir is almost certain to be sold this summer. arts.sum: Manchester United are considering cashing in on one of their high-profile stars despite Ruben Amorim wanting to keep him.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo: Al-Nassr fans protest against Man Utd legend after 'disasterclass'
arts.sum: Since hooking up with the team, Ronaldo has only picked up the 2023 Arab Club Champions Cup. The Saudi Pro League title for 2024/25 had been a target at the beginning of the season, but that is slipping away from the five-time Ballon d’Or winner’s side following a 3-2 loss against Al-Ettifaq at home on Friday. Cristiano Ronaldo slammed after Al-Nassr 'disasterclass': He needs sold!

Ruben Amorim’s side saw their sorry season reach a new low last weekend after a narrow defeat at Tottenham. arts.ttl: Man United 'plotting' intriguing Marcus Rashford 'swap deal' with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Manchester United allegedly plan to use Marcus Rashford in a bid to sign Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlovic during this summer's transfer window.
